name: Lindy's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Bake the graham cracker crust in the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan for 8-10 minutes. Cool the crust and grease the sides of the pan with butter.
Preheat the oven to 500 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, flour, orange zest, lemon zest, and vanilla until smooth.
Beat in the whole eggs and egg yolks one at a time, stirring lightly after each addition.
Stir in the heavy cream.
Pour the filling into the prepared pan and bake for 12 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 200 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking the cheesecake for an additional hour.
Let the cheesecake cool in the pan on a rack, then refrigerate overnight before serving.
